508a5(na): blangs gcig tu yin pa 'jug byang dang las gsal bshad byas nad zhus rkabs de nad dang 'dag/ ghyung p kha dg dgen pas mthun byed du g.yod pa gnang ba'i lag bris yig dgad dpo ning thams cen ma tshang med kyang sne dul sad 
508a6(na): brgyad yed pa can dang / bla ma a g.yung don po ches dpar ba'i bka' 'gyud nang gi thams chen gnyis dang 'dra bsnud byas pa yin/ de gnyis myang 'das 'gres la bab 'jegs yed pa gcig mthun yin na'ang / kha dgen can / 
508b1(na): la cha tshang med skabs bla ma a g.yung can des gtso bsnud byas pa yin/ de la bris pas chad nad mang ba dang / myang 'das 'gres la bab 'dzegs can gyi dang tshugs segs dmigs gsal can 'dug/ ma dpo khra yad can nang myang / 
508b2(na): 'das 'gres la bab 'jegs la byas pard ma tshang gi 'gre sangs 'dag pasegs gtso dp de la brgyud bcos med par sed gzhag byas theg/ geng gsal bsdud dpo de'i dge mtshan yod pa rnams kyis cad nad mongon gsal can la / 
508b3(na): kha brkangs byas te/ rna bzhi mdzed lnga'i ds rnying phyegs bgrigs dekyi a grangs rapad zhus bgrigs byas pa yin kyang // dung ma rtegs dbang gis cad lhag segs yod nges te/ spyi la bbayad sngen lo nga lnga brgya / 
508b4(na): lhag nas gangs can ad kyi yul du yi ga' par khang 'jzugs brkun dang // se gzhi legs bsgrigs byas pa'i 'grems spel yengs khyab byed srel dad zin na'ang / g.yung dung ban gyi dse gzhi' bsdu bsgrigs byed pa'o ga skabs kyi / 
508b5(na): thed pug de tsam byung med pas/ 'i phyegs la nyams myeng dang lag len segs la mig zhes len gni dken pas gol cha gsad du yin pa dang / ges su de zhus bgrigs pa che yang mkhyen dbyed dab 'byams pa min chad/ 'di'i /
